trade_decision_grades.rationale: Textbook prop-bridge trade: validated Donchian breakout entry, SL trailed above entry (profit locked while open), exited at TP within 0.5 of target, +297.12 net (~2.2R). The manual report-back loop (filled->closed) worked end to end.

Reduce leg realised +20.01. Same churn family as above.

proposed_tweaks.tweak: consider a min_confidence floor (>=0.4) — this window's only real-money open came from a conf-0.29 signal graded D

consolidated.headline: First prop WINNER banked: Breakout ETH long closed at TP for +297.12 net (~2.2R) with the manual-bridge report loop working end to end. Claude decision-grade coverage RESTORED to 100% (161 backfilled; 2,727/2,727). IB gateway was dark most of 07-03 (recovered 17:01Z; benign-diag verdict, definitive check at Monday's CME open). Real-money: no closed trades; one D-grade XRP long (~$33) opened on bybit_2. Paper: -531.87 realised, all intent_reduce churn under the #5101 soak watch. alpaca_live confirmed structurally size-0 on its $150 balance — operator accepted as-is. xauusd_trend_1h disabled (silent-enabled debris).
